examples.title: Count word frequencies with HashMap
examples.description: Demonstrates using getOrDefault to count occurrences of strings.
examples.pseudocode:
create empty map counts from String to Integer
for each word in words:
  old = counts.getOrDefault(word, 0)
  counts.put(word, old + 1)
print counts

examples.title: Invert a Map (value to set of keys)
examples.description: Builds a reverse index from Map<K,V> to Map<V, Set<K>>.

examples.title: Group anagrams using canonical keys
examples.description: Uses a sorted-character key to group words that are anagrams.
